reviews.review_msg: Extremely unorganized, never responds to emails, doesn't post lectures until many weeks later, missing assignments and module activities as nothing is ever posted. Avoid this prof at all costs unless you want to be stressed the entire semester.

If you read the other reviews, listen to them! The prof went MIA for the first MONTH of classes, didn't post lecture or anything, changed paper criteria last minute, and then posts 1 lecture and MIA again for a month. NEVER responds to emails. Easy class but you will be stressed and have to email the department all semester to get anything done.
